description:
calibre is the one stop solution to all your e-book needs.

calibre is an e-book manager. It can view, convert, edit and catalog e-books in all of the major e-book formats. It can also talk to e-book reader devices. It can go out to the internet and fetch metadata for your books. It can download newspapers and convert them into e-books for convenient reading. It is cross platform, running on Linux, Windows and macOS.
New features
- Allow exporting annotations in the HTML format as a standalone web page that can be viewed in any browser with support for light/dark themes, searching and filtering by highlight style
- E-book viewer: Ask AI: Allow using the {selected} placeholder when typing free form queries to the AI as well
Bug fixes
- E-book viewer: Fix text area not always resizing correctly when window is resized when the scrollbar is enabled
- Fix a regression in the previous release that broke python templates in the book details panel
- Fix a regression in the previous release that caused default values for custom columns to not be used when adding new books
Improved news sources
- Scientific American
- Phoronix
